ns0:entry.ns0:title: EasyTier/EasyTier
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EasyTier/EasyTier
Language: rust
A simple, decentralized mesh VPN with WireGuard support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HalFrgrd/flyline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HalFrgrd/flyline
Language: rust
Flyline: a Bash plugin to replace readline for a modern line editing experience: syntax highlighting, agent integration, rich prompts, tooltips, fuzzy history search, and more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ModernRelay/omnigraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ModernRelay/omnigraph
Language: rust
Lakehouse native graph engine with git-style workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
Language: rust
Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
Language: rust
Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cjpais/Handy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cjpais/Handy
Language: rust
A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ctxrs/ctx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ctxrs/ctx
Language: rust
Search the coding agent history already on your machine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dani-garcia/vaultwarden
Language: rust
Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: helix-editor/helix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/helix-editor/helix
Language: rust
A post-modern modal text editor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kdsz001/OpenWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kdsz001/OpenWiki
Language: rust
OpenWiki — Mac desktop AI knowledge management tool. Capture clipboard, build personal wiki, get AI insights.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nautechsystems/nautilus_trader

Language: rust
A new type of shell

URL: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr
Language: rust
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ratatui/ratatui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ratatui/ratatui
Language: rust
A Rust crate for cooking up terminal user interfaces (TUIs) 👨‍🍳🐀 https://ratatui.rs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stalwartlabs/stalwart
Language: rust
All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sxyazi/yazi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi
Language: rust
💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: uutils/coreutils
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/uutils/coreutils
Language: rust
Cross-platform Rust rewrite of the GNU coreutils

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/warpdotdev/warp
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
